body:
totally-sapphic-posts:

When you’re both burnt out, so instead of weekly dates, you have weekly recuperating days where you watch comfort shows, take naps together, make each other warm drinks, cuddle and just…create peace within each other.

trail.content_raw: When you’re both burnt out, so instead of weekly dates, you have weekly recuperating days where you watch comfort shows, take naps together, make each other warm drinks, cuddle and just…create peace within each other.
trail.content: When you’re both burnt out, so instead of weekly dates, you have weekly recuperating days where you watch comfort shows, take naps together, make each other warm drinks, cuddle and just…create peace within each other.
